# Ehsanul Haque Siam: Full Profile

> AI Engineer & Full-Stack Developer, Dhaka, Bangladesh. Published researcher who ships production systems, from blockchain R&D and RAG pipelines to e-commerce platforms serving 50,000+ users
> Last updated: 2026-07-05. Contact: ehsanul.siamdev@gmail.com

I bridge research and production. Software Engineer at Ledgercross, building across the stack: backend services, React Native and Flutter apps, AI features, and the CI/CD and cloud infrastructure that ship them. Published peer-reviewed research (a Taylor & Francis book chapter and an accepted IEEE QPAIN 2026 paper). Previously drove 1.5x client revenue shipping 4 production websites at BetaScript LLC and built 15+ web scrapers with Gemini-powered AI pipelines at BDTracks. Obsessed with turning complex problems into systems that scale.

## Experience

### Software Engineer at Ledgercross (Jun 2026–Present)
Full-stack + platform engineer at an early-stage software firm, owning work across the whole stack: backend services, React Native and Flutter apps, AI-powered features, and the CI/CD pipelines and cloud infrastructure that ship them. Startup-wide surface area with end-to-end ownership.

### Lead Researcher — NLP & LLMs at Arché Intelligence Lab (Jul 2026–Present)
Leading NLP and LLM research at Arché (arche-lab.org), a student-led AI research group at AIUB. Driving work on large language models and natural language processing—including Bengali NLP—toward peer-reviewed publications alongside a distributed team of researchers across AIUB, BUET, BRAC, and RUET.

### Research Assistant (Full-time, Remote) at Deepchain Labs (Apr 2026–May 2026)
Researching blockchain, cybersecurity, and quantum cryptography at Deepchain Labs (deepchainlabs.com), producing peer-review-ready papers, threat analyses, and technical documentation across multiple security domains.

### Solo Developer (Part-time, ~20 hrs/week) at BetaScript LLC (Jan 2026–May 2026)
Shipped 4 production React websites for this US-based digital agency, driving 1.5x client revenue growth measured by post-launch analytics and client billing. Full lifecycle ownership spanning design, React 19 + TanStack Start architecture, and Netlify deployment across restaurant, e-commerce, and agency platforms serving 50,000+ end users.

### AI & Data Engineer (Part-time, ~15 hrs/week) at BDTracks (Aug 2025–May 2026)
Powering Bangladesh's commodity and accident tracking platform (bdtracks.com). Built 15+ web scrapers and fine-tuned Google Gemini 2.5 Flash/Pro via Vertex AI for automated data classification. Engineered production pipelines processing daily feeds from multiple national sources into structured datasets serving live dashboards.

### AI Engineering Intern at Unies (Feb 2026–May 2026)
Built production RAG pipelines for academic resource retrieval using Pinecone, ChromaDB, LangChain, and LlamaIndex. Engineered automated LLM evaluation pipelines and FastAPI backends powering curriculum-aligned tutoring systems. Benchmarked embedding quality across vector databases to optimize retrieval accuracy.

### Team Lead - Game Development at AIUB (Oct 2024–Dec 2024)
Led a team of 5 developers to ship a 2D platformer with 3 levels, a custom OpenGL rendering engine, SFML audio, and SQLite persistence, all within a 3-month deadline. Earned 4 GitHub forks and a YouTube demo.

## Featured Projects

### ScholarHub
Students waste 20+ hours searching fragmented scholarship sources before deadlines pass. Built a unified discovery platform that indexes 12,000+ opportunities daily from 272 automated spiders, reducing search time to minutes. Full-text search with multi-facet filtering, admin review dashboard, and dynamic SEO. React 19 + TanStack Start SSR + Convex + Python scraping pipeline.
Tech: React, TypeScript, TailwindCSS, TanStack Start, Convex, Python, Web Scraping
Live: https://thescholarhub.netlify.app/
Code: https://github.com/EhsanulHaqueSiam/ScholarHub

### TTT Autos
Dealership websites lack trust: generic templates with FOMO-driven tactics. Built a cinematic 'Velocity Noir' platform with interactive 3D vehicle showcases, transparent pricing, and a 17-page admin dashboard supporting cars, motorcycles, and bicycles. Polymorphic inventory with 7 indexed tables and 12+ filter facets. React 19 + TanStack Start + Drizzle ORM + Spline 3D.
Tech: React, TypeScript, TailwindCSS, Framer Motion, TanStack Start, Drizzle ORM, SQLite, Spline 3D
Live: https://ttt.autos/

### KaajKormo
Job applications in Bangladesh are tedious and opaque. Reimagined the experience with Tinder-style swipe-to-apply, AI-powered CV parsing that calculates skill-match percentages, and employer Kanban boards for pipeline tracking. Full-stack: React 19 frontend + Rust/Axum backend + PostgreSQL 17.
Tech: React, TypeScript, Rust, PostgreSQL, TailwindCSS, Framer Motion
Code: https://github.com/EhsanulHaqueSiam/kaajkormo

### OfferLagbe
Local deals platforms lack trust: anyone can post anything. Built a community-driven marketplace where user trust scores auto-moderate content (bad actors removed at <10% trust, verified badges at 5+ upvotes). Real-time map with clustering and heatmap visualization. React 19 + Convex real-time DB + MapLibre GL + PWA with offline support.
Tech: React, TypeScript, TailwindCSS, Convex, MapLibre, PWA
Live: https://offerlagbe.netlify.app/
Code: https://github.com/EhsanulHaqueSiam/offerlagbe

### Aurum Gold
Gold buyers need real-time pricing they can trust. Built a premium e-commerce platform with live gold rate integration, editorial-grade product presentation, and Lighthouse 90+ performance. Cinematic animations create a luxury feel that matches the product. React 19 + TanStack Router + Zustand.
Tech: React, TypeScript, TailwindCSS, Framer Motion, Zustand, E-commerce
Live: https://theaurum.netlify.app
Code: https://github.com/EhsanulHaqueSiam/aurum-gold

### Void Threads
Most e-commerce sites leave money on the table with poor mobile UX. Built a conversion-optimized streetwear platform using sales psychology such as exit-intent recovery, urgency indicators, and trust signals, plus pixel-perfect responsive coverage from 320px to 1920px. SSR via Nitro 3 for instant page loads. React 19 + TanStack Start.
Tech: React, TypeScript, TailwindCSS, Framer Motion, Zustand, E-commerce
Live: https://voidthreadsco.netlify.app
Code: https://github.com/EhsanulHaqueSiam/void-threads

### Indian Claypit
A restaurant needed to move from phone-only orders to a digital platform without losing the personal touch that earned their reputation. Built the full-stack solution: frontend ordering experience, backend order processing, event booking, and catering integration, now serving 50,000+ customers with a 4.9★ rating from 2,847 Google Reviews.
Tech: React, TypeScript, TailwindCSS, Framer Motion, Node.js, E-commerce
Live: https://indianclaypit.com/

### BetaScript
A US-based digital agency needed a web presence that matched their premium positioning and 24-hour response promise. Designed and shipped an animated React site with service showcases, client testimonials, and conversion-optimized contact flows, now representing a BD-USA partnership serving 150+ clients with 100% satisfaction.
Tech: React, TypeScript, TailwindCSS, Framer Motion
Live: https://betascript.online/

### Student Management System
Reduced university data retrieval time from 50ms to 7ms, a 7x performance improvement validated by load testing with 45+ active users, by redesigning the database to 3NF normalization with Singleton connection pooling in Java. Earned 17 GitHub stars.
Tech: Java, MySQL, JDBC, Design Patterns, 3NF
Live: https://github.com/EhsanulHaqueSiam/StudentManagementSystem/wiki
Code: https://github.com/EhsanulHaqueSiam/StudentManagementSystem

### Spotify Sentiment Analysis
Classified sentiment of 52,702 Spotify reviews with 85-90% accuracy benchmarked against precision/recall/F1 metrics by building a 17-task ML pipeline with TF-IDF vectorization and Multinomial Naive Bayes.
Tech: Python, scikit-learn, NLP, TF-IDF, Naive Bayes
Code: https://github.com/EhsanulHaqueSiam/spotify-review-sentiment

### Mario's Multiverse Adventure
Led a team of 5 to ship a 2D platformer with 3 unique levels and a physics engine earning 4 GitHub forks and a YouTube demo by building a custom rendering engine with OpenGL, SFML audio, and SQLite high scores in C++.
Tech: C++, OpenGL, SFML, SQLite, CMake
Live: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wK7qjTRkStg
Code: https://github.com/EhsanulHaqueSiam/MarioMultiverseAdventures

### BD News Scraper & Analytics
Automated daily scraping of 74+ Bangladeshi news sources with 82 spiders publishing a live Kaggle dataset updated daily via GitHub Actions by engineering a production pipeline with Scrapy, Playwright, ML-powered sentiment analysis, and Docker deployment.
Tech: Python, Scrapy, FastAPI, Docker, GitHub Actions, Kaggle, scikit-learn
Live: https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/ehsanulhaquesiam/bangladesh-news-articles
Code: https://github.com/EhsanulHaqueSiam/BDNewsPaperScraper

### Hotel Management System
Built a hotel operations platform with Bkash/Nagad payment integration earning 15 GitHub stars across 171 commits and 4 releases by developing a modular Java Swing application with secure authentication and admin/user dashboards.
Tech: Java, Swing, File I/O, OOP
Code: https://github.com/EhsanulHaqueSiam/HotelManagementSystem

### Android Development Journey
Curated a comprehensive Android learning repository with 54+ structured lessons as measured by full coverage from beginner fundamentals to advanced patterns (MVVM, Hilt, Paging 3) by building hands-on projects with Retrofit, RxJava3, Room Database, and Firebase integration.
Tech: Java, Android, MVVM, Retrofit, Firebase
Code: https://github.com/EhsanulHaqueSiam/AndroidDevJourney

### Pharmacy Management System
Built a pharmacy operations platform streamlining medicine management and sales tracking as measured by integrated inventory control, user role management, and 2 contributors collaborating under MIT license by developing a C# .NET Windows Forms application with SQL Server and Guna UI framework.
Tech: C#, .NET, SQL Server, Guna UI
Code: https://github.com/EhsanulHaqueSiam/PharmacyManagementSystem


## Case Studies (problem → approach → measured result)

### ScholarHub
**Problem:** Students seeking international scholarships face fragmented information scattered across hundreds of sources, making it nearly impossible to discover relevant opportunities before deadlines pass.
**Approach:** Built a unified scholarship discovery platform with 272 automated spiders scraping daily, intelligent deduplication, multi-facet search and filtering, and an admin dashboard for quality control, giving students a single place to find every scholarship they're eligible for.
**Process:** Scraping Pipeline — Engineered 272 spiders across 7 scraping methods (HTML, API, RSS, JSON-LD, Scrapling, AJAX, Inertia.js) with wave-based scheduling, automatic deduplication, and source health monitoring. | Discovery Engine — Implemented full-text search with autocomplete, filtering by country, degree level, field of study, funding type, and prestige tier, plus nationality-aware recommendations. | Admin Dashboard — Built a review queue for pending scholarships, source trust manager for auto-publish vs manual review, collections manager, and tags manager with status-based stats. | SEO & Performance — Implemented dynamic OG image generation with Satori, XML sitemaps, JSON-LD structured data, country and degree landing pages, and SSR with TanStack Start on Netlify.
**Measured results:** Scholarships: 12,000+, Sources: 272, Scraping Methods: 7, Source Categories: 5

### TTT Autos
**Problem:** Traditional dealership websites rely on generic templates with FOMO-driven sales tactics, lacking a premium browsing experience that builds trust through transparency and visual immersion.
**Approach:** Built a cinematic 'Velocity Noir' dealership platform with interactive 3D models, headlight-effect UI, multi-angle photo galleries, and a comprehensive admin dashboard, all architected for trust-first positioning with transparent pricing and verified quality badges.
**Process:** Cinematic Design System — Implemented 'Velocity Noir' aesthetic with headlight amber gradients, industrial grain textures, and dimensional parallax using Framer Motion animations. | Polymorphic Inventory — Designed a flexible Drizzle ORM schema supporting cars, motorcycles, and bicycles with category-specific fields, 7 indexed tables, and 12+ filter facets. | 3D Vehicle Immersion — Integrated Spline 3D scenes with lazy loading via Intersection Observer, error boundaries, and Suspense fallbacks for zero-jank performance. | Admin Dashboard — Built full inventory CRUD, photo management with UploadThing, hero slide editor, testimonials, and analytics with Better Auth session management.
**Measured results:** DB Tables: 7, Filter Facets: 12+, Admin Pages: 17, Animation Variants: 10+

### Indian Claypit
**Problem:** Indian Claypit relied on phone-only ordering, losing potential customers who expected digital convenience. Their excellent food and service (reflected in 2,847 Google Reviews) wasn't translating to online reach.
**Approach:** Built a full-stack restaurant platform with seamless online ordering, real-time order tracking, event booking for private dining, and catering integration, maintaining the warmth of their brand while scaling digitally.
**Process:** Ordering Experience — Designed an intuitive menu browsing and cart system with real-time availability, dietary filters, and frictionless checkout optimized for mobile-first customers. | Backend & Processing — Built order processing pipeline handling real-time submissions, kitchen notifications, and order status tracking from placement to delivery. | Event & Catering — Integrated event booking for private dining and large-scale catering requests with custom menu selection and automated quote generation. | Performance & SEO — Optimized for Core Web Vitals with lazy loading, image optimization, and local SEO to capture nearby customer searches.
**Measured results:** Customers: 50,000+, Rating: 4.9★, Reviews: 2,847, Platform: Production

### Student Management System
**Problem:** University administration struggled with scattered excel sheets and slow manual data retrieval, leading to administrative bottlenecks.
**Approach:** Built a centralized Java Swing application with a normalized MySQL database, implementing the Singleton pattern for efficient connection management.
**Process:** Database Normalization — Redesigned schema to 3NF, eliminating data redundancy and improving integrity. | Performance Tuning — Implemented connection pooling to reduce query latency from 50ms to ~7ms. | UX Design — Created intuitive dashboards for both Admins and Students using Guna UI.
**Measured results:** Query Speed: 7ms, Data Integrity: 100%, User Adoption: 45+

### Mario's Multiverse Adventure
**Problem:** Computer Graphics courses require practical application of theoretical concepts like rendering, physics, and linear algebra in a real-time environment.
**Approach:** Developed a 2D platformer game engine from scratch using OpenGL and C++, demonstrating core graphics programming and game development principles.
**Process:** OpenGL Rendering — Built a custom rendering engine using OpenGL, GLUT, and GLEW to handle textures, sprites, and animations. | Physics Engine — Implemented collision detection and basic physics mechanics for character movement and environmental interaction. | Cross-Platform Build — Configured CMake and vcpkg to ensure the project builds and runs consistently on Windows and Linux.
**Measured results:** Levels: 3, Forks: 4, Stars: 2

### BD News Scraper & Analytics
**Problem:** Bangladesh lacks a comprehensive, up-to-date news dataset for research and NLP applications, with no automated pipeline for continuous data collection and analysis.
**Approach:** Built a production-grade news aggregation platform with 74+ spiders, automated daily scraping via GitHub Actions, ML-powered analytics, and public Kaggle dataset for the research community.
**Process:** Enterprise Scraping — Developed 82 spider files with Playwright integration, Cloudflare bypass, rotating proxies, and smart fallback architecture. | ML Analytics Pipeline — Implemented sentiment analysis, TF-IDF topic clustering, breaking news detection via spike analysis, and duplicate detection. | Automated Infrastructure — GitHub Actions daily scraping at 12:00 PM BDT, auto-upload to Kaggle, Docker/Kubernetes deployment, multi-format exports. | API & Dashboards — FastAPI REST + GraphQL endpoints, Streamlit dashboards, Leaflet.js geo-visualization, real-time notifications (Telegram/Slack/Discord).
**Measured results:** Sources: 74+, Spiders: 82, Daily Auto: ✓, Kaggle: Live

### Hotel Management System
**Problem:** Manual hotel operations (booking, check-in/out) are slow, error-prone, and lack secure payment integration.
**Approach:** Developed a comprehensive Java Swing desktop application with secure user authentication, room management dashboards, and integrated local payment gateways.
**Process:** Modular Architecture — Adhered to interface-driven design principles to ensure maintainability and scalability. | Payment Integration — Integrated local payment methods (Bkash, Nagad) for seamless financial transactions. | Security Implementation — Built a secure authentication system with signup, login, and password recovery functionality.
**Measured results:** Commits: 171, Releases: 4, Stars: 15

## Publications & Research

### Decoding Research Trends: A Clustering Based Topic Modeling Framework
IEEE QPAIN 2026, 2026 | Accepted (IEEE Xplore, Scopus Indexed)
Proposed a clustering-based topic modeling framework for decoding research trends accepted with minor revision for IEEE Xplore and Scopus indexing by developing novel clustering algorithms applied to academic publication data.

### Beyond NER: A Comparative Benchmark of Medical BERTS for Multi-Label Adverse Drug Reaction Classification
International Conference on Intelligent Data Analysis and Applications (IDAA 2025), Dec 2025 | Book Chapter (Taylor & Francis)
Benchmarked domain-specific Medical BERT models for multi-label adverse drug reaction classification demonstrating improved performance over general BERT on the PsyTAR dataset by fine-tuning BioBERT and PubMedBERT architectures with multi-label classification heads.

### Unfolding Emerging Issues in the Context of Changing Climatic Scenario
2nd South Asian Conference on Climate, Sep 2024 | Statistical Analysis & Presentation
Presented statistical analysis of emerging climate issues to an international audience contributing to South Asian regional understanding of environmental trends by collecting, modeling, and visualizing climate data with statistical methods.

## Awards, Certifications & Achievements

- **Dean's List Awards - 3x Academic Excellence** (award): Earned 3 Dean's List Awards for academic excellence with CGPA of 3.95, 3.89, and 3.75+ across consecutive semesters by maintaining top performance while building 15+ projects and publishing research.
- **Web & Data Summit 2024 - Participation** (certificate): Participated in the Web & Data Summit 2024, gaining insights into cutting-edge web technologies and data science practices from industry experts.
- **AIUB CS FEST 2024 - 1st Runner Up** (award): Won 1st Runner-Up at AIUB CS FEST 2024 App Showcase competing against 20+ teams evaluated by industry judges by demonstrating innovative mobile development with polished UI/UX and presentation.
- **Published Research - Taylor & Francis (IDAA 2025)** (publication): Published a Taylor & Francis Book Chapter on medical AI at IDAA 2025, an international conference indexed by major databases, by benchmarking BioBERT, PubMedBERT, and BERT for multi-label adverse drug reaction classification.
- **South Asian Climate Conference 2024** (certificate): Presented original climate research at an international conference demonstrating statistical findings on South Asian climate trends by conducting data collection, statistical modeling, and visualization of regional environmental data.
- **GitHub Open Source - 60+ Stars** (achievement): Accumulated 60+ GitHub stars across 26 repositories with the top project (Student Management System) earning 17 stars and 8 forks by building well-documented, production-grade open source projects with comprehensive Wikis.
- **Mario's Multiverse Adventure - Game Dev** (project): Led a team of 5 to ship a 2D platformer with 3 unique levels and a physics engine earning 4 GitHub forks by building a custom OpenGL rendering engine with SFML audio and SQLite persistence in C++.
- **Spotify Sentiment Analysis - 85-90% Accuracy** (project): Classified sentiment of 52,702 Spotify reviews with 85-90% accuracy benchmarked against precision/recall/F1 metrics by building a 17-task ML pipeline with TF-IDF vectorization and Multinomial Naive Bayes.
- **Certified Ethical Hacker - Team Matrix** (certificate): Certified Ethical Hacker through a 4-month, 29-module offensive security program passing 3 exams (theoretical, lab, viva) by performing penetration tests on live servers, exploiting OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities, and completing CTF and bug bounty engagements.
- **54+ Android Development Lessons** (learning): Completed comprehensive Android development curriculum from beginner to advanced. Mastered MVVM architecture, Retrofit, Hilt, RxJava3, Room Database, and Firebase integration.
